settings.content: Browse gloves and essential supplies trusted across medical, food service, janitorial, retail, and laboratory environments.

settings.benefit_1_description: Tiered and bulk pricing designed for recurring business orders.
settings.benefit_2_description: Fast, reliable fulfillment to keep your operation running without delays.
settings.benefit_3_description: Test our gloves before committing to full orders.
settings.benefit_4_description: Early access to new SKUs and product updates.

settings.author: I keep coming back for more!
settings.title: Comfortable, lightweight and strong
settings.content: "These 4 mil gloves are so much more comfortable and lightweight, without sacrificing durability and strength, then 7 mil gloves. Easy to put on, which is important if changing gloves often. Highly recommend"

settings.author: Great lancets
settings.content: "I have used several boxes of these before writing this review, these lancets always work and do not hurt to use, I always get a good drop of blood 🩸. These are my lancets I will continue to use some of the best you can buy for comfort, simplicity, and cost"

settings.author: Great size and saturation.
settings.content:
"Sometimes when I buy alcohol wipes, the pads are too big, but these are a nice size. They’re small enough so you don’t get alcohol all over your hands which I find kind of yucky. These are the perfect size for prepping an earring or a tweezer which is what I bought these for.
"
